Section Header:
Inclusion criteria

all must be YES

All criteria below must be confirmed YES before proceeding. If any criterion is NO the volunteer is ineligible.
Field Label: I1 - Age 18 to 55 years at screening
Field Note: Upper limit 55 - older volunteers have altered hepatic metabolism
Units kg per square metre
Confirmed by medical history physical examination and screening laboratory results

Field Label: I6 - Willing and able to comply with all study procedures
Field Note: Including the full PK sampling schedule across 48 hours
Obtained prior to any study related procedure

Section Header:
Exclusion criteria

 all must be NO

Any YES response below makes the volunteer INELIGIBLE. Do not proceed to dosing. Complete screen failure section and notify PI.
Field Label: E1 - Use of CYP3A4 inducers or inhibitors
Field Note: Within 14 days of screening. Examples rifampicin ketoconazole grapefruit juice St Johns Wort
Prescription within 7 days or over the counter within 48 hours. Paracetamol excepted at standard doses

Field Label: E3 - Diabetes or raised fasting glucose
Field Note: Known diabetes mellitus or fasting glucose at or above 7.0 mmol per litre
Known or suspected immunosuppression including HIV active malignancy or immunosuppressive therapy
Pregnancy breastfeeding or unwillingness to use adequate contraception
Known hypersensitivity or allergic reaction to dexamethasone or any other corticosteroid
Current smoker or any nicotine use within 3 months. Confirmed by urine cotinine test on dosing day
Above 14 units per week females or 21 units per week males. Or positive breathalyser on dosing day
Participation in another clinical trial within 90 days of screening

Choices, Calculations, OR Slider Labels: 1, Eligible - proceed to dosing | 2, Screen failure - do not proceed | 3, Pending - awaiting results
